zh.lifeSummary: 當Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers於1230年出生在法國布格o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯時，他的父親Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne17歲，母親Yolande de Dreux18歲。他於1248年1月26日與Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1266年8月4日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年36歲，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers于1230年出生在法国布格o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯时，他的父亲Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne17岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux18岁。他于1248年1月26日与Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1266年8月4日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年36岁，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Odo
meanings: the Celtic name Aodh has been Anglicised into Hugh, and Latinised variously Hugo, Ædus, Ædanus, Aidus, and Odo.

en.lifeSummary: When Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers was born in 1230, in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, was 17 and his mother, Yolande de Dreux, was 18. He married Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers on 26 January 1248, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 4 August 1266, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 36, and was buried in Acre, Northern, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers est né en 1230, à Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers le 26 janvier 1248, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1266, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Acre, Northern, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers 1230 in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne 17 und seine Mutter Yolande de Dreux 18. Er hat am 26. Januar 1248 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1266 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel und wurde in Acre, Northern, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers è nato il nel 1230 nel Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Dreux, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers il 26 gennaio 1248, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1266, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Acre, Northern, Israele.

ja.lifeSummary: Odo of Burgundy Count of Neversが1230年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルヴィレアイネス-エン-ドウエスモイスで生まれた時，父Hugues IV duc de Bourgogneは17歳，母Yolande de Dreuxは18歳であった。1248年1月26日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトでMatilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Neversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1266年8月4日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで36歳で死去し，イスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers(이)가 1230년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 비레이네스--드스모이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1248년 1월 26일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 8월 4일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers nasceu em 1230, em Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers em 26 de janeiro de 1248, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1266, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Acre, Northern, Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers родился в 1230 г. в местности виллеинес-ен-дуесмоис, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers 26 января 1248 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1266 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers nació en 1230, en Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers el 26 de enero de 1248, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1266, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Acre, Northern, Israel.
